summary: A white sedan drives along a wet roadway adjacent to a building with multiple garage doors. The vehicle maintains a steady pace while passing by several parked cars and trucks. A tram approaches from the right side of the frame, traveling parallel to the sedan.

events_timeline.event: The tram moves alongside the white sedan, maintaining a safe distance.

uncertainties: Exact speed of the tram relative to the sedan is unclear.
Visibility of tram tracks beneath the tram is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There are no collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions between the tram and the sedan.
